## OBJECTIVES
- IMMEDIATE OBJECTIVE: Create the isolated experimentation sandbox.
- OVERALL OBJECTIVE (section S04): Eliminate the manual-tracing quality advantage by generating, scoring, and converging large populations of candidate vectors in an isolated experimentation sandbox — reproducibly and observably.

## THE ONE ACTION

